main_1_h1: The Journey of Sahih Al-Bukhari through the Centuries
main_1_p_1: Imam al-Muhaddith (Narrator) Muhammad Ibn Ismail al-Bukhari, may Allah have mercy on him, compiled his book “The Sahih” in sixteen years. He extracted it from about six hundred thousand hadiths and made it an argument between himself and Allah. The journey of As-Sahih began through the Hadith Scholars' Councils that were held since the era of Imam Al-Bukhari, may Allah have mercy on him, and this has continued to our time
main_1_p_2: As soon as the reputation of “the Sahih” spread, the scholars devoted themselves to study it and learn from its sciences. However, others focused on vowelizing and perfecting its version, until some of these versions became known by the names of their owners, such as the version of Al-Hafiz Ibn Sa’ada Al-Andalusi, the version of Imam Abu Al-Hasan Al-Saghani, and the version of Imam Sharaf Ad-Din Al-Yaunini.
main_1_p_3: With the emergence of printing presses and the spread of printing, attention was directed towards this great book, which took a large proportion of these publications. It was printed first in Leiden, the Netherlands, and then in the Indian city of Bombay. After that, its editions spread and varied, but the most famous of the editions is the “Sultan Edition,” which Sultan Abdul Hamid II, may Allah have mercy on him, ordered to be printed.
main_1_p_4: After the diversification of sciences and knowledge, and the entry of technology into all fields of sciences, it was necessary for “Sahih Al-Bukhari” to attain its proper place, and to be singled out with a pioneering work that shows the aspects of the nation’s interest in it. Thus, this unique encyclopedia appeared, which took the lead in realizing many of the researchers’ hopes and their aspirations towards this blessed book.
main_2_p: There is no doubt that “Sahih al-Bukhari” has gained great importance among the majority of Muslims, and the evidence for this is the large number of good books that have been written about it with regard to controlling pronunciation, punctuation, explaining Hadith and studying a chain of narrators, as well as clarifying a strange or revealing an ambiguous Hadith -  So that all aspects of it have been researched, studied and detailed. This encyclopedia came to gather these blessed efforts in one site and to facilitate  for researchers and scholars of different scientific specializations such as interpretation, Hadith, jurisprudence and language. It is known that “Sahih Al-Bukhari” is considered ahead in each of these sciences, as it included many sources and references, both printed and manuscript, and linked them to “As-Sahih” in a distinctive technical manner, through new classifications and services that facilitate the researcher'saccess to the smallest details in

. It was also able, through what it collected and accomplished, to highlight an important aspect with which Allah has honored this nation, which is the extreme accuracy in preserving the Prophetic Sunnah and transmitting it to its bearers, generation after generation.
main_4_p_1: The books entered in the encyclopedia were completely compared and adjusted to their written originals, with the text linked to the approved written original in the comparison, automatically and simultaneously.
main_4_h2_2: Linking the Encyclopedia Books to As-Sahih
main_4_p_2: The places where Hadith from Sahih Al-Bukhari was mentioned in the encyclopedia books were linked with the text of the Sahih, so that the researcher can know the additions of these books and their different narrations.
main_4_p_3: We designed special fonts that preserve the hadith terms that the Muhadtheen would  used in their  scripts, for example brackets, correction and different pronunciations.
main_4_p_4: The encyclopedia includes rare hand written copies of the narrations of Al-Jami’ as-Sahih and a well known copy linked to the sahih carefully researched and compared with the version of al-Hafidh al-Yunaini.
main_4_p_5: This encyclopedia is unique in extracting dozens of titles for unpublished reference books and sourece-You will see this light for the first time –The number of its volumes exceeded one hundred and fifty volumes.
main_4_p_6: The encyclopedia contains many hand written principles that were written in the handwriting of its authors, or were read to them, or were writhen close to their era.
main_4_h2_7: Quote from the speech of His Excellency Dr. Saad Bin Turki Al-Khathlan
main_4_p_7: …In my opinion, this great service to Sahih Al-Bukhari and this colossal effort has never been matched in the history of the Islamic nation. Perhaps this is in corroboration of the words of Allah Almighty:
. And, that this is from Allah's preservation of the most authentic books of the Sunnah, especially with the fierce attack from the enemies of Islam on the books of Sunnah.
main_4_h2_8: Quote from the speech of His Eminence Prof. Dr. Saad Bin Abdullah Al-Humayyd
main_4_p_8: Sahih Al-Bukhari Encyclopedia Project is one of the projects that the Islamic Nation is proud of. Whoever looks at this project and the effort, time, and money spent on it, will be amazed at these great services that were presented to the most authentic book after Allah's Book. As for the commentaries that have not been printed before, you will find it amazing, commentaries that we have not heard about before, or heard but thought that they do not exist, as well as many other things that surprise you in this project, which we aspire to see in “Sahih Muslim”, then the rest of Sunnah books.
main_4_h2_9: Quote from the speech of His Eminence Prof. Dr. Khaled Bin Mansour Ad-Drees
main_4_p_9: By the grace of Allah, I was able to visit colleagues at Ata'at Alelm Corporation, and I was pleased to hear an interesting and beautiful presentation about this marvelous encyclopedia. Never before in history has Sahih al-Bukhari been served such a great service, and praise be to Allah who kept me to be a witness to this great historical project.
main_4_h2_10: Quote from the speech of His Eminence Prof. Dr. Khaldoun Muhammad Salim Al-Ahdab
main_4_p_10: A scholar,insightful critic, and faithful historian, who have studied works on “Al Jamie Sahih” of Imam Al-Bukhari, may Allah Almighty have mercy on him, finds that this distinguished and venerable work has transcended the predestined works that preceded it, and transcended them to stages that represented to the majority of scholars and researchers a kind of wish and dream in addressing and achieving them with this broadness and comprehensiveness, and with this remarkable consistency and this great editing and high documentation. Whoever looks closely at this exceptional work realizes that those who have supervised it were seeking every little and big piece of knowledge, so this work - by the grace of Allah - came as a sign in the service of the Noble Hadith: preparation, trust, documentation, methodology, guidance, implementation, approximation, facilitation and perfection. This venerable work, which is superior in its breadth, comprehensiveness, methodology, accuracy, and coverage, was the best response to the skeptics and the slanderers of the Noble Sunnah and campaigners for Sunnah.
main_4_h2_11: Quote from the speech of His Eminence Sheikh Dr. Abdul Bari Bin Hammad Al-Ansari
main_4_p_11: They excelled in the method that they followed in their work, and they were successful, Allah willing, and the most commendable effort that drew the attention of those who are familiar with such work, was the large number of manuscripts that they used in their work, despite the preciousness and originality of many of them. Perhaps if this work was accomplished on this approach, they would achieve - Allah willing - the aspirations of many Hadith scholars and students.
main_4_h2_12: Quote from the speech of His Eminence Sheikh Dr. Mahmoud Bin Ahmed Saleh Mira
main_4_p_12: This work required hard work, which Allah has prepared for it, men who have dedicated themselves to its service and have sacrificed for the sake of this project all that is precious and worthy. They did not spare any effort, money or prestige but employed it in order to achieve the goal of this project, and Allah had guided them to acquire original written copies related to the project, so they facilitated the ways of benefiting from them, and expanded the circle of beneficiaries.
